## vpngate

vpngate is a client for vpngate.net

```
vpngate [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for vpngate
```

### SEE ALSO

* [vpngate cache](vpngate_cache.md)	 - Manage cached vpn server data
* [vpngate connect](vpngate_connect.md)	 - Connect to a vpn server (survey selection appears if hostname is not provided)
* [vpngate list](vpngate_list.md)	 - List all available vpn servers
